dtsPropsFor.Toast:
/** Confirmation message; an empty string renders the live region with no visible pill. */
  msg: string;
dtsPropsFor.Breadcrumbs: items: { name: string; screen?: string; params?: Record<string, unknown>; href?: string }[];
dtsPropsFor.HelpCallout: feature: string;   // key into lib/help-content HELP[]
dtsPropsFor.TrustAtAGlance: item: Listing;   // reads item.certBody, item.badges, item.verify?.certNo, item.name
dtsPropsFor.CouponCard:
coupon: PublicCoupon; // lib/coupons: id, business_id, business_name?, business_slug?, title, details, discount_type ("percent"|"fixed"|"free_item"|"bundle"), discount_value, reward_text, min_spend_cents, starts_at, ends_at, valid_days, redeem_start, redeem_end, total_limit, claimed_count, terms
  compact?: boolean;
dtsPropsFor.ProfileStrengthCard:
input: StrengthInput; // { photosCount: number; descriptionLength: number; hasHours: boolean; hasContact: boolean; hasWebsite: boolean; verified: boolean }
  onGoTab: (tab: string) => void;
dtsPropsFor.AuthorBio:
author?: BlogAuthor; // { id; name; type:"Person"|"Organization"; role?; bio?; avatar?; url?; sameAs?:string[] }
  name?: string;
dtsPropsFor.HotelCard: hotel: Hotel; // see lib/halal-hotels — needs flags (8 booleans), halalScore, verified, verifiedBy, stars, guestRating, reviewCount, city, country, priceFrom, image
dtsPropsFor.DestinationCard: c: TravelHub; // TravelCity + { h1: string; title: string }; card reads slug, umrah, name, country
dtsPropsFor.HalalChip:
hotel: Hotel; // reads flags, verified, halalScore
  compact?: boolean;
